pi_items.source: Direct web verification at URL; confirmed real website designed for web scraping practice
Extracted from target_url; domain name is consistent
Script analysis (setup_task.sh line 29) and export_result.sh line 10; confirmed as target export directory in task scripts
Script analysis (setup_task.sh line 30) and export_result.sh line 13; confirmed as target report file
Verified through site structure analysis: books.toscrape.com homepage links directly to 20+ book pages, 50+ category pages, and 50 pagination pages; crawl with 500 URL limit easily exceeds 30 rows

Site architecture analysis reveals: Depth 0 = homepage, Depth 1 = category/pagination/book pages (all linked from homepage), Depth 2 = pages linked from pagination (page-3, page-4 linked from page-2); confirmed through curl requests to https://books.toscrape.com/, /catalogue/page-2.html showing 'next page' navigation
No authoritative external source; arbitrary requirement threshold; reasonable based on task description requirements (distribution analysis, example URLs, recommendations)

privileged_info_summary: The task crawls books.toscrape.com, a real website at https://books.toscrape.com/ specifically designed for web scraping practice. The website contains 1000 books organized in categories and 50 pages, providing synthetic (randomly-assigned) book data. The target domain is books.toscrape.com. The site has at least 3 distinct crawl depth levels (depth 0: homepage, depth 1: categories/pagination/product pages, depth 2: pages from pagination navigation). Screaming Frog SEO Spider will export results to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ and a text report must be written to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/architecture_report.txt. The CSV export must contain at least 30 rows and the Crawl Depth column which tracks link distance from the starting page. The report must contain at least 400 characters.
